name: Dmitrii Shilov
title: Software Developer
summary: Full-stack developer with experience building web applications from concept to production. Focused on TypeScript, React, and Node.js ecosystems. Comfortable with cloud infrastructure (Azure), CI/CD pipelines, and end-to-end ownership of products.

bullets: Designed and built a full-stack Telegram news reader (React + Hono + SQLite) deployed on Azure Container Apps with CI/CD pipeline
Implemented JWT auth with TOTP 2FA, refresh-token rotation, and session management
Built a download manager with worker threads, IPC bridge, circuit breaker, and SSE progress streaming
Achieved 85% test coverage (691 tests) across unit, integration, and component tests using Vitest
Set up monitoring with Telegram alerts, Azure Monitor KQL alerts, and structured logging (pino)

projects.name: TG News Reader
projects.description: Full-stack Telegram news reader: React 19 + Hono + SQLite/Turso. Features: media lightbox, download workers, i18n, TOTP auth, Azure deploy.

projects.name: dmitriishilov.com
projects.description: Personal CV site built with Astro (SSG). Auto-generated PDF via Playwright in CI. Deployed to Azure Static Web Apps.
